bonuses.stat:
Dealing damage with Burning Light twice within 30 seconds creates a 5 meter area for 5 seconds. This effect can occur once every 6 seconds. 

While in the area, dealing damage with an Aedric Spear ability launches a spear at your target, dealing 1684 Magic damage and applying Sundered and increasing your Weapon and Spell Damage by 300 for 6 seconds. The damage scales off the higher of your Weapon or Spell Damage.
